reasoning: Lactate clearance and aerobic endurance are your primary focus areas due to the significant 5-20 minute power decline. Your last ride shows an average power of 152.6W, indicating the need to build more fatigue resistance to sustain higher efforts, particularly for the Alpine Loop's sustained climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 6x6 min over-unders: 3 min at 209-218W, 3 min at 242-256W. Focus on maintaining control and steady breathing.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
